title: Create: Unbreakable Netherite Sword
description: This mod simply adds, a new unbreakable netherite sword, with balanced create mod recipe for it
body:
![Icon of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4723acdf76d2cb5d8af776c28efd351e1432292d.png)
# Create: Unbreakable Netherite Sword
Killing things in minecraft can get very annoying when your main wepon breaks, that's where **Unbreakable Netherite Sword** comes in, it is unbreakable and has a balanced recipe

# The actual recipe for it:
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29e6e6b05eeefa27d660bac6013de952e0ff194a.png)

**Curseforge version:** [Link (Click me)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-unbreakable-netherite-sword)
